lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining a factory-fresh luster with absolutely no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with premium materials that remain in brand-new condition and all features functioning perfectly. Meticulously garage-kept and dealer-serviced, this car offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from a new vehicle.
The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible paint fading and a few minor dents. The interior shows wear on the seats and carpeting. All mechanical systems are functional.

The car is in good condition. The exterior shows minor scratches and small rock chips. The interior is clean with light wear consistent with regular use. Mechanically, the vehicle has been well-maintained and is in good working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant investment and labor to be made roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents, visible rust on the lower panels and wheel arches, and a failing clear coat across the hood and roof. Inside, the interior is heavily worn; the upholstery has multiple tears, several plastic trim pieces are missing, and the air conditioning and radio are non-functional. Mechanically, while the engine does start, it idles roughly and produces noticeable smoke. The transmission slips between gears, and the suspension is very loose, requiring a complete overhaul. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a major project or a source for parts.

Get ready for a rewarding project! This vehicle is the ultimate 'mechanic's special' for someone who loves to tinker and restore. While it is currently in poor condition and will need significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back to its former glory, it offers a fantastic foundation for a dedicated hobbyist or a great source for parts. It's a diamond in the rough waiting for the right pair of hands!

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent care and mechanical reliability. Demonstrating robust performance and a well-preserved interior, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. Its current condition reflects a commitment to regular servicing and careful ownership, positioning it as a premier choice within its market segment.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! This car has been so reliable for me and is still in really solid shape. It drives super smoothly and has been well-loved and maintained over the years. It's the perfect fit for someone who wants a dependable, high-quality vehicle without that 'brand new' price tag. I'd love for you to come take it for a spin—I think you're going to fall in love with how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system for optimized torque delivery across the power band. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock, ensuring precise mechanical engagement. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment. The suspension utilizes refreshed bushings and tuned dampers to maintain factory-spec kinematics, while the cooling system has been overhauled with a high-efficiency radiator to manage thermal loads during spirited driving. A mechanically sound driver's car for the purist.
Used car. Good mechanical condition. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs well.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-loved daily driver that perfectly balances performance with practicality. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish, though minor road chips consistent with regular, careful use are present upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery shows only minimal signs of wear, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and recent professional servicing. It handles with precision and offers a composed ride that inspires confidence. This car has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains in dependable, attractive condition for its next owner. It is a reliable choice for anyone seeking quality and longevity without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a documented service history and a well-preserved aesthetic, this automobile represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer. Its mechanical integrity and refined driving dynamics ensure a sophisticated and confident experience on the road.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetics. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent performance and a refined driving experience. It represents a premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury and proven reliability.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and looks great—ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean interior.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer. The exterior presents beautifully, finished in a timeless coat that retains a deep luster, with only minor stone chips and light surface wear consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of quality; the premium upholstery is free of rips or stains, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension remains firm yet compliant, providing a confident ride on both city streets and highways. This car has been garage-kept and smoke-free, ensuring it remains in commendable shape for its next owner. Complete with a full set of service records and two keys, it is ready for immediate enjoyment.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been meticulously curated to ensure peak operational integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved interior, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who demands both reliability and a commanding road presence. This offering stands as a testament to balanced performance and enduring value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning motorist, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile exhibits consistent performance and remains in commendable aesthetic condition throughout. It serves as a testament to diligent ownership, providing a sophisticated balance of luxury and long-term reliability.

Reliable used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. Finished in a timeless metallic silver, the exterior maintains a strong curb appeal with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of major wear, while all electronic features—including the premium sound system and navigation—function flawlessly. Under the hood, this car has been meticulously serviced, with a documented history of oil changes and preventative maintenance. It drives smooth and quiet, offering a responsive handling experience that feels as solid as the day it was first driven. Whether you are looking for a reliable commuter or a sophisticated weekend cruiser, this car delivers exceptional value and peace of mind.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of sophisticated styling and proven mechanical reliability. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. Experience the assurance of a vehicle that has been cared for with precision.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. Offering a balanced fusion of comfort and durability, it remains an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking sustained value and a refined driving experience.

Hey there! I'm selling my awesome car and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my trips. I've taken great care of it, and it still drives beautifully! It's ready for its next adventure and would be perfect for someone looking for a dependable, well-loved ride. Come check it out!

The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is free of tears, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions exactly as intended.
